edges.evidence_quote: In 1984, the Outlaws entered Toronto when their national president, Stanley "Beamer" McConnery, persuaded the Iron Hawgs gang to "patch over" to the Outlaws.

Musitano crime family.description: The Musitano crime family is a 'Ndrangheta organized crime family based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, with branches in Italy. Founded by Angelo Musitano in the 1940s, it engaged in racketeering, drug trafficking, and murder. The family was involved in a power struggle with rival Hamilton families, leading to the killings of Johnny Papalia and Carmen Barillaro in 1997. Key members Angelo and Pat Musitano were killed in 2017 and 2020, respectively.

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Musitano.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ai Musitano di Platì

descriptions: Musitano crew rebelled against Buffalo family, leading to murders of Papalia and Barillaro.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Murdock, the Musitano brothers had been fed up with being a satellite (crew) of the Buffalo family and having to pay tribute money to the family.

descriptions: The Musitano crime family ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia, a member of the Buffalo family's Canadian faction.
edges.evidence_quote: On May 31, 1997, Papalia was murdered by hitman Kenneth Murdock who was hired by the Musitano crime family leader's Pasquale "Fat Pat" Musitano and his brother Angelo Musitano.

descriptions: The Buffalo crime family exerts influence over the Musitano family in the Hamilton mob war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Buffalo/Todaro Crime family is strong enough to call the shots in the recent mob war between the Musitano and other crime families in the Hamilton underworld.

descriptions: Independent Soldier member Sukhvir Singh Deo caused tensions with Musitano family over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: causing tensions with the Musitano family of Hamilton, who saw him as an intruding on their own territory.

descriptions: Infobox lists Musitano crime family as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Musitano crime family

descriptions: A Musitano family associate was inducted into the Los Angeles family.
edges.evidence_quote: According to informants for the FBI and the Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP), the Canadian mobster and Musitano crime family associate Albert Iavarone was inducted into the Los Angeles family shortly before he was shot dead in Hamilton, Ontario on September 13, 2018.

descriptions: The Luppinos and Musitanos are involved in a mafia war in Hamilton.
edges.evidence_quote: one report stated that the Luppinos and the Musitano crime family seemed to be involved in the city's 'mafia war'.

descriptions: The Musitano are a 'ndrina (sub-unit) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Musitano sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta originaria di Platì.

descriptions: The Musitano family stayed closer to their 'Ndrangheta cell, indicating affiliation.
edges.evidence_quote: staying closer to their 'Ndrangheta cell

descriptions: The Musitano are close to the Mammoliti according to investigators.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo gli inquirenti sarebbero vicini ai Mammoliti di Oppido Mamertina

descriptions: The Musitano 'ndrina was affiliated with the Ruga 'ndrina in Italy during the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: it was affiliated with the 'ndrine Ruga and Aquilino

descriptions: The Musitano 'ndrina was affiliated with the Aquilino 'ndrina in Italy during the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: it was affiliated with the 'ndrine Ruga and Aquilino

descriptions: The Musitanos did not form a strong alliance with the Buffalo crime family, unlike the other Hamilton families.
edges.evidence_quote: Unlike the other two Hamilton families, the Musitanos did not form a strong alliance with the Buffalo crime family

descriptions: Musitano was a satellite crew of Buffalo family and resented paying tribute.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Murdock, the Musitano brothers had also been fed up with being a satellite (crew) of the Buffalo family and having to pay tribute money to the family.

descriptions: The Musitano family supports the Cuntrera-Caruana clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The wiretaps of Domenico and Joe Violi recorded a discussion that the Musitanos were supporting the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan

descriptions: Musitanos supported the Cuntrera-Caruana clan.

descriptions: Musitano planned to murder Luppino family members to become godfather.
edges.evidence_quote: Murdock also claimed that he was waiting for Pat Musitano to approve the murders of four Luppino crime family members Natale Luppino and Vincenzo Luppino (the two sons of Giacomo Luppino) and Domenic Violi and Giuseppe Violi (the two sons of Paolo Violi).

descriptions: Luppino crime gang is an enemy of Musitano family.
edges.evidence_quote: The enemies included 'criminal groups in Hamilton, Buffalo, Montreal and elsewhere, including the Luppino and Papalia crime gangs,' according to the National Post.

descriptions: The Musitano ordered the murders of Johnny Papalia and Carmen Barillaro, indicating a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1997, la famiglia ha ordinato i colpi di mob di Johnny Papalia e Carmen Barillaro.

edges.evidence_quote: the family ordered the hits of Johnny Papalia

descriptions: Papalia crime gang is an enemy of Musitano family.
edges.evidence_quote: The enemies included 'criminal groups in Hamilton, Buffalo, Montreal and elsewhere, including the Luppino and Papalia crime gangs,' according to the National Post.

descriptions: The Musitano family is one of three centralized crime families in Hamilton, alongside Luppino and Papalia.
edges.evidence_quote: the family was one of three centralized organized crime organizations in Hamilton, with the other two being the Luppino crime family and the Papalia crime family

descriptions: The Rizzuto family formed an alliance with the Musitano brothers to eliminate the Papalia family leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: Rizzuto formed an alliance with the Musitano brothers

descriptions: The Musitano family ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia and his lieutenant, leading to the decline of the Papalia family.

Green Gang.description: The Green Gang was a Chinese secret society and criminal triad organization prominent in Shanghai during the early to mid 20th century. It originated from the Luojiao Buddhist sect and grain transport boatmen along the Grand Canal. The gang engaged in criminal, social, and political activities, including opium trafficking. Key leaders included Du Yuesheng and Huang Jinrong.

descriptions: The Hopi Boys are allied with the Green Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Green gang

descriptions: Huntington Park Locos is listed as a rival of Florencia 13 in the infobox.

descriptions: The PKK cooperated with MLKP as part of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK and MLKP ) with the aim of overthrowing the Turkish government of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

Santa Cruz Cartel.description: Bolivian drug cartel headquartered in Santa Cruz de la Sierra, one of the largest in the country. Active since the 1980s, it has been involved in narco-terrorist incidents including assassination attempts on DEA agents and bombings. Allied with Colombian, Brazilian, and Mexican trafficking organizations, it engages in turf wars with smaller gangs.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cartel de Santa Cruz as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cartel de Santa Cruz

descriptions: La Corporación had La Conexión as a rival.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellín Cartel , Comando Vermelho

descriptions: Santa Cruz Cartel has La Corporación as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Corporación , Bolivian government

The Council.description: African-American organized crime syndicate in New York City that controlled the heroin trade in Harlem during the 1970s. Formed by Nicky Barnes in 1972, the seven-man organization handled local criminal disputes and drug distribution. It was heavily connected to the Italian-American Mafia, supplied by the Lucchese crime family. The Council dissolved in 1983 after Barnes became a federal informant.

descriptions: The Purple Gang was allied with The Council according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... The Council

descriptions: East Harlem Purple Gang is listed as an ally of The Council in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lucchese Crime Family , East Harlem Purple Gang

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Frank Lucas gang, various gangs in New York City including their allies

descriptions: Lucchese crime family supplied raw heroin to The Council.
edges.evidence_quote: The Council was heavily connected to the Italian-American Mafia in New York City, where Matthew Madonna of the Lucchese crime family supplied the group with raw heroin

descriptions: The Gianola brothers and the Vitale gang fought a war for control of Detroit's Italian underworld.
edges.evidence_quote: In late 1918, Vitale broke away from the Gianola gang and established himself independently, aligning himself with the remnants of the Bosco group. What became known as the 'Gianola-Vitale War' emerged as one of the bloodiest battles in the history of the Detroit Mafia.

Goda-ikka.description: The Goda-ikka is a yakuza group based in Yamaguchi, Japan, formed in 1948 as the Goda-gumi by Koichi Goda. It is the largest yakuza group in Yamaguchi Prefecture, with an estimated 30 members. The group was renamed Goda-ikka in 1968 and became a designated yakuza group in 1992. It is a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai.

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Asano-gumi are both members of the Gosha-kai, cooperating against Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Goda-ikka's founder was a member of Kagotora-gumi, indicating a predecessor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was formed in 1948 as the Goda-gumi ( 合田組 , Gōda-gumi ) in Shimonoseki, Yamaguchi by Koichi Goda, then a member of an old yakuza clan, the Kagotora-gumi.

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Kyodo-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai, cooperating against Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai, cooperating against Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Shinwa-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai, cooperating against Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Kyodo-kai and Goda-ikka are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Kyodo-kai has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Asano-gumi , the Goda-ikka

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with Goda-ikka.

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Goda-ikka are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .
